prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 62mm compressor wheel, 76mm turbine) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** to handle the **V35A-FTS 3.4L twin-turbo V6**'s boost demands, targeting 18-20 psi for ~600whp on E85 with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full flex-fuel and turbo mapping control.

Full **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged slugs** (with anti-detonation grooves) to withstand the increased cylinder pressures, paired with **Manley Turbo Tuff I-beam connecting rods** and a **Cusco 8-pt bolt-in roll cage** to reinforce the body structure under high torque loads.

Drivetrain reinforcement via a **KAAZ 2.5-way limited-slip differential** (front and rear) with **Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 4.88:1 ring & pinion gears**, **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch**, and **Darton Sleeved 8660 steel cylinder liners** to prevent bore distortion under extreme heat cycles.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works GX550 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, extended rockers, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** for off-road contrast.

**Vorsteiner V-FF107 22-inch forged wheels** (9.5J front, 11J rear) in **Gunmetal Finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35R22 front, 305/30R22 rear)** for aggressive stance, paired with **AP Racing BBK (6-piston front, 4-piston rear)** for track-ready braking.

**Seibon Carbon GX550 hood** (with functional heat extractor vents) and **Rocket Bunny rear wing (Type 3, 1,800mm span)** to balance downforce, complemented by **OEM Lexus Black Line Edition grille** and **Morimoto XB LED headlights** with **Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro sequential turn signals**.
